transcript.clean_text: as the bunch of the 109th tour rested in kakkason for the final time in this race vingegor still had yellow his teammate fernat in green with simon kesker the king of the mountains antarepogacha second place overall but still in the white jersey for the best young rider and under the blazing hot temperatures jonas fingal led by two minutes 22 with garrett thomas in third place at 243 valdez and yates all in the top five to the pyrenees then the final week of the tour and again blazing hot temperatures pushing up towards 40 degrees leaving carcassonne and heading to foie the foothills of the pyrenees and a couple of first category climbs towards the end of the day pondolas and the mighty murderer before finishing in four almost identical to a stage that took place 10 years previous when luis leon sanchez had been the winner a huge group got up the road 28 riders michael woods was one of the best survivors of that alongside damiano caruso once again had been in the breakaway and inside the final 60 k's things began to break up by this point they were eight minutes ahead of the yellow jersey group and the yellow jersey group being attacked by taday gacha not hanging around the young slovenian two-time defending champion going on the por de lairs that woke up jumbo visma and jonas vinegar as he has been so far in this race equal to everything thrown at him unable to make the difference on the climb he tried to do the same on the descent that didn't work and at the front ugo ul was going out ahead on the descent heading into the final climb trying to attack the race from the breakaway all having half a minute on his closest chasers including tony galapa and behind in the yellow jersey group still things waiting to really kick off raphael michael went to work as the differences were being made but a mechanical issue meant that seth cuss would have to go to work for jonas van gaal and almost seven minutes ahead all was cresting the top of the final climb alone 27 kilometers of descending awaited him with his gap at just over 20 seconds jorgensen the best in the chase there cuss the best of the domestiques again over the top he'd keep the pace on okay right thomas would return with the help of danny martinez who'd been in the morning breakaway and by this point hommambalde was shipping time hugo all still ahead and it's principal chaser mateo jorgensen going down on that final descent first and second now belonging to the same team jurgensen would be hurt would chase on but would never have the same power again in the yellow jersey group still a look around quintana on his way up into fourth place valdez still suffering a number of minutes behind and up ahead a beautiful ending to a tough story ten years after his brother had been killed by a drunk driver hugo ulla winning for the first time ever in road cycling for the first time ever on the tour de france a beautiful victory in canada's first since the late 1980s it'd be a canadian one-three both canadian riders from israel premier tech finishing on the day's podium second place going to valentin madwes remembering his late brother with whom he used to watch the tour de france as a child almost six minutes later watford led yonas finger across the line but bogata was with him garrett thomas was there no change in the top three as all took the stage israel's second of this race stage 16 another day ticked off for the race leader walt fernat once more playing super domestique jonas finger still in charge of the tour de france his gap remains the same two minutes and 22 seconds with two pyrenean stages remaining then a day possibly for a sprint or a breakaway a time trial and a party on the champs-elysees it all sounds simple but as they head to perhagood and into the high pyrenees anything can change at any moment a short stage but one packed with climbing called spa orchest also the call de value and the climb to the altiport our third runway finish of this tour at perhagood 129.7 kilometers you'll better watch the stage live or on demand as usual on gcn plus you
